Healthcare Campuses

Security that protects the people who protect patients.

Healthcare environments require security operations that are responsive, well-documented, and respectful of the clinical environment. SYAG provides a structured operational platform for hospital and clinic security teams.

Key use cases

Controlled Visitor Access

Healthcare facilities need strict visitor management — visiting hours, patient zone restrictions, contractor clearances. SYAG's QR-based visitor system manages all of this with full audit trail.

Incident Documentation for Clinical Environments

Every incident in a healthcare setting — from an altercation in the waiting area to a patient elopement — needs immediate response and complete documentation. SYAG's incident management captures everything in real time with evidence attachment.

Guard Coverage in Complex Buildings

Multi-floor hospital campuses require structured patrol coverage. SYAG's checkpoint verification system ensures every patrol route is completed and compliance can be demonstrated to accreditation bodies.

Staff Safety

Clinical staff facing workplace violence can trigger a panic alert from a mobile device or fixed panic button. SYAG's IoT integration routes the alert to the nearest security guard with GPS-precise location in seconds.

See SYAG for your healthcare campus.

Request a demo →
